note: On-chain Verus bridge contracts (proxy 0x7151..., SubmitImports 0xa045..., VerusProof 0x5E80..., TokenManager 0x08F0...) are UNVERIFIED on Etherscan V2. These source files were pulled from the canonical open-source repository monkins1010/Verus-Ethereum-contracts (the Verus-Ethereum bridge codebase) to ground the analysis in the real code. Function bodies and constants match the on-chain bytecode behaviour observed in the verbose trace (output.txt).
